languages.text: {n}Доселе молчавший, Соломон вдруг кивает.{/n} "Верно. Противник, который выделяется из общей массы необычностью, наверняка преподнесет неприятный сюрприз. И вряд ли один".
{n}Silent until now, Solomorne suddenly nods and says,{/n} "Very true. An enemy that stands out due to some unusual feature is likely to present an unpleasant surprise. Or several."
languages.original_text: {n}Доселе молчавший, Соломон вдруг кивает.{/n} "Верно. Противник, который выделяется из общей массы необычностью, наверняка преподнесет неприятный сюрприз. И вряд ли один".

traits.locale_text: {n}Silent until now, Solomorne suddenly nods and says,{/n} "Very true. An enemy that stands out due to some unusual feature is likely to cause an unpleasant surprise. Or several."
{n}Silent until now, Solomorne suddenly nods and says,{/n} "Very true. An enemy that stands out due to some unusual feature is likely to present an unpleasant surprise. Or several."

{n}Silent until now, Solomorne suddenly nods in thanks.{/n} "That is valuable tactical information, thank you. A weapon that can wound or kill an Adeptus Astartes with such ease is something worth knowing about in advance."
{n}Silent until now, Solomorne suddenly nods and says,{/n} "Very true. An enemy that stands out due to some unusual feature is likely to cause an unpleasant surprise. Or several."
{n}Silent until now, Solomorne suddenly nods and says,{/n} "Very true. An enemy that stands out due to some unusual feature is likely to present an unpleasant surprise. Or several."

languages.text: {n}今まで沈黙していたソロモーンが突然感謝の意を表す。{/n}「それは貴重な戦術情報です。ありがとうございます。アデプタ・アスターテスを簡単に傷つけたり殺したりできる武器は、事前に知る価値があります」
languages.original_text: {n}Silent until now, Solomorne suddenly nods in thanks.{/n} "That is valuable tactical information, thank you. A weapon that can wound or kill an Adeptus Astartes with such ease is something worth knowing about in advance."

traits.locale_text:
今まで沈黙していたソロモーンが突然感謝の意を表す。
「それは貴重な戦術情報です。ありがとうございます。アデプタ・アスターテスを簡単に傷つけたり殺したりできる武器は、事前に知る価値があります。」

languages.text: {n}一直沉默的索罗蒙，突然点了点头，说道：{/n}“确实。那种看着就与众不同的敌人，大概率会让你吃苦头，也许还不止一次。”
languages.original_text: {n}Silent until now, Solomorne suddenly nods and says,{/n} "Very true. An enemy that stands out due to some unusual feature is likely to present an unpleasant surprise. Or several."

traits.locale_text: {n}一直沉默的索罗蒙，突然点了点头，说道：{/n}“确实。那种看着就与众不同的敌人，大概率会让你吃苦头，也许还不止一次。”

languages.text: {n}Solomorne rompe el silencio que ha guardado hasta el momento y asiente.{/n} «Es muy cierto. Si un enemigo destaca por algún aspecto poco común, probablemente tenga alguna sorpresa desagradable oculta. O varias».
languages.original_text: {n}Silent until now, Solomorne suddenly nods and says,{/n} "Very true. An enemy that stands out due to some unusual feature is likely to present an unpleasant surprise. Or several."

traits.locale_text: {n}Solomorne rompe el silencio que ha guardado hasta el momento y asiente.{/n} «Es muy cierto. Si un enemigo destaca por algún aspecto poco común, probablemente tenga alguna sorpresa desagradable oculta. O varias».

languages.text: {n}Solomorne, der bis jetzt geschwiegen hat, nickt mit einem Mal und sagt:{/n} "Wohl wahr. Ein Feind, der durch eine ungewöhnliche Eigenschaft hervorsticht, birgt vermutlich eine unerfreuliche Überraschung. Oder mehrere."
languages.original_text: {n}Silent until now, Solomorne suddenly nods and says,{/n} "Very true. An enemy that stands out due to some unusual feature is likely to present an unpleasant surprise. Or several."

traits.locale_text: {n}Solomorne, der bis jetzt geschwiegen hat, nickt mit einem Mal und sagt:{/n} "Wohl wahr. Ein Feind, der durch eine ungewöhnliche Eigenschaft hervorsticht, birgt vermutlich eine unerfreuliche Überraschung. Oder mehrere."

languages.text: {n}Solomorne, qui avait gardé le silence jusque-là, hoche soudain la tête.{/n} « Vous avez raison. Un ennemi présentant des caractéristiques inhabituelles est susceptible de nous réserver une désagréable surprise. Voire plusieurs. »
languages.original_text: {n}Silent until now, Solomorne suddenly nods and says,{/n} "Very true. An enemy that stands out due to some unusual feature is likely to present an unpleasant surprise. Or several."

traits.locale_text: {n}Solomorne, qui avait gardé le silence jusque-là, hoche soudain la tête.{/n} « Vous avez raison. Un ennemi présentant des caractéristiques inhabituelles est susceptible de nous réserver une désagréable surprise. Voire plusieurs. »

languages.text: {n}Şu ana kadar sessiz olan Solomorne, aniden başını sallayıp konuşuyor.{/n} "Çok doğru. Bazı sıra dışı özellikleriyle öne çıkan bir düşmanın nahoş bir ya da birden çök sürpriz sunması muhtemeldir."
languages.original_text: {n}Silent until now, Solomorne suddenly nods and says,{/n} "Very true. An enemy that stands out due to some unusual feature is likely to present an unpleasant surprise. Or several."
